chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6835 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.28905/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025 Mr.Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the petitioner refers to the order dated 4.11.2022 and states that appeal is already pending before the Customs Appellate Tribunal, Karachi and it would be just and proper that pending the aforesaid no coercive action may be taken against the petitioner. Learned Assistant Attorney General has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
